name: miedzy-nami
description: PWA dla par — naprawiony routing gier, czytelne Pikantne i wspólne statystyki pary na obu telefonach.

scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs release-v08.test.mjs foundation-v09.test.mjs multiplayer-v091.test.mjs multiplayer-v092.test.mjs multiplayer-v093.test.mjs multiplayer-v094.test.mjs cloud-timeout-v095.test.mjs pairing-answer-v096.test.mjs multiplayer-v097.test.mjs multiplayer-v098.test.mjs multiplayer-v099.test.mjs ux-audit-v0910.test.mjs stabilization-v0911.test.mjs
